titlestmt.titleproper: Preliminary Guide to the Collection of Finnish Bookplates
titlestmt.author: Compiled by Molly E. Dotson

maintenanceevent.eventdescription: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on Thursday November 8, 2018 at 00:03

did.abstract: This is a collection of early to mid-20th-century bookplates from Finland. Most of the bookplates belonged to private individuals, although the collection also contains a few institutional bookplates from various library, university, or social organizations, or businesses.

acqinfo.head: Immediate Source of Acquisition
acqinfo.p: The Yale Bookplate Collection was formerly housed in Sterling Memorial Library. The collection was incorporated into the Arts of the Book Collection in 1984 and then moved to the Seeley G. Mudd Library in 1990. In 2011 it was transferred to the Robert B. Haas Family Arts Library.

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: The materials are open for research.

userestrict.head: Conditions Governing Use
userestrict.p: Copyright has not been transferred to Yale University.

prefercite.head: Preferred Citation
prefercite.p: Collection of Finnish Bookplates, Robert B. Haas Family Arts Library, Yale University.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: This is a collection of early to mid-20th-century bookplates from Finland. Most of the bookplates belonged to private individuals, although the collection does contain a few institutional bookplates from various library, university, or social organizations, or businesses.

Most of the bookplates are mounted on paper cards, measuring roughly 9.5 x 6.5 inches. Some of the mounts and some of the bookplates themselves bear evidence of various inscriptions, including artist and date. A sampling of the artists represented in this collection includes: Olof Eriksson, Axel Haartman, Väinö Mäkelä, Erkki Tanttu, and Bjarne E. Uttuslien.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: Arranged in original alphabetical order, according to Finnish collation rules.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: This series is arranged in its original alphabetical order, according to Finnish collation rules. As a result, å, ä, and ö are collated after z, and w is considered the equivalent of v and interfiled as such.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: This series contains mostly private bookplates arranged alphabetically by the patron's last name. Whenever identified, institutional bookplates have been noted.

odd.head: General note
odd.p: This folder contains a bookplate for Finska Nordstjernan, r. f.

odd.head: General note
odd.p: This folder contains a bookplate for Samfundet Ehrensvärd of Sveaborg.

odd.head: General note
odd.p: This folder contains bookplates for Suomen Koneliike Oy and Suomen Kuvalehden Kirjatalkoot.

odd.head: General note
odd.p: This folder contains two copies of a bookplate for the President of the Republic of Finland (Tasavallan Presidentii or Republikens President), dated 1920 and designed by Axel Haartman.

odd.head: General note
odd.p: This folder contains bookplates for Åbo Stadsbibliotek and Åbo stads historiska museum.

odd.head: General note
odd.p: This folder contains three unidentified Finnish bookplates.
